description: Pins the shared config_id/interface_id positive-int rejections, the destroy bypass gate, and the config-interface DELETE after bypass. linode_id rejection text diverges (see report).

cases.name: rejects non-positive config_id
cases.expect_error: config_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: rejects non-positive interface_id
cases.expect_error: interface_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_instance_config_interface_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
